conclusion: c8 rowchunk4 full-attention grouping remains correctness-red even with accepted projection-dispatch metadata: the baseline rowchunk4 candidate has prefixes [137,137,137,137,11,60,117,137], and per-row input/QKV/context/gate/output plus compact-cache/temp-output/scratch diagnostics do not restore full generated-token equality. The first chunk rows stay green while the second chunk fails, keeping the correctness cap at rowchunk2 and leaving full-attention grouping>=4 as the active blocker. No throughput claim is made.
